sentences.arabic: كَانَ الشِّعْرُ الْعَرَبِيُّ قَدِيمًا هُوَ دِيوَانَ الْعَرَبِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska poezija je u prošlosti bila riznica Arapa.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic poetry was historically the register of the Arabs.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الشُّعَرَاءُ الْكَلِمَاتِ الْجَمِيلَةَ لِوَصْفِ الصَّحْرَاءِ وَالْخَيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Pjesnici koriste lijepe riječi da opišu pustinju i konje.
sentences.translationEn: Poets use beautiful words to describe the desert and horses.

sentences.arabic: فِي كُلِّ بَيْتٍ مِنَ الشِّعْرِ، نَجِدُ مَشَاعِرَ صَادِقَةً وَصُوَرًا فَنِّيَّةً رَائِعَةً.
sentences.translation: U svakom stihu poezije nalazimo iskrena osjećanja i divne umjetničke slike.
sentences.translationEn: In every verse of poetry, we find sincere feelings and wonderful artistic imagery.

sentences.arabic: الْيَوْمَ، يَقْرَأُ الطُّلَّابُ هَذِهِ الْقَصَائِدَ لِيَتَعَلَّمُوا اللُّغَةَ الْفُصْحَى.
sentences.translation: Danas studenti čitaju ove pjesme kako bi naučili književni jezik.
sentences.translationEn: Today, students read these poems to learn the standard language.

sentences.arabic: الشِّعْرُ يَجْعَلُ النَّفْسَ تَشْعُرُ بِالرَّاحَةِ وَالسَّعَادَةِ.
sentences.translation: Poezija čini da duša osjeća mir i sreću.
sentences.translationEn: Poetry makes the soul feel comfort and happiness.
